description: CompositionDark grey scooped neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with cap sleeves, elasticated sides from waist to hemline, thin belt running through side loops and chest print with sequinsFittingComfortWash care Handwash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Celebrating the joyful spirit of Brazillian singer Bobbi Humphrey, this Blacks and Blues t-shirt from wrangler has a rustic look with a herringbone neckline and cap sleeves. Designed as a comfort wear, this tee has elasticated sides from the waist to the shirt hemline, coupled with a thin belt running through side loops that accentuate your waist and add to your dainty, feminine look. Team this with slim Fit jeans or white trousers and ballerina flats for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
